provenance.selection_rule: Use the smallest threshold with zero current out-of-scope false non-abstentions while preserving retained in-scope behavior; do not retune per candidate, lane, or external tranche.

guards: Future external hard-negative imports must record this threshold policy version or a newer documented global threshold policy.
Existing ontology_version_at_decision semantics must be preserved when a new threshold policy is introduced.
Changing the floor for one candidate or tranche is leakage and must block import.
